import json


def deduplicate_events(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for event in events:
        key = json.dumps(event, sort_keys=True)
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            unique.append(event)
    return unique


def find_matching(items: list[dict], target: dict) -> list[dict]:
    target_str = json.dumps(target, sort_keys=True)
    return [item for item in items if json.dumps(item, sort_keys=True) == target_str]


def group_by_content(records: list[dict]) -> dict:
    groups = {}
    for rec in records:
        key = json.dumps(rec, sort_keys=True)
        groups.setdefault(key, []).append(rec)
    return groups
